@45 [Bb | F]
  A.PIANO 1: A3@3>2^56 C4@6>2^56 F3+F5@9>11^104 A3@13>2^56 C4@16>2^56 F3+D5@19>12^104 Bb3@22>4^56 D4@25>3^32 Bb4@29>13^104 F3@30>2^32 Bb3@31>5^56 D4@36>2^56 A4@39>11^80 F3@40>6^56 A3@44>2^56 C4@47>3^56 C5@49>6^80 F3@50>3^32 A3@54>2^32 C4@57>2^56 F3@60>2^56 A3@63>2^56
@46 [F | C7]
  A.PIANO 1: C4@1>2^56 C6@5>17^104 F3@6>2^56 A3@10>2^56 C4@12>2^56 F3@16>2^56 A5@17>12^104 A3@20>2^56 C4@23>2^56 F3+F5@27>10^80 A3@30>2^32 C4@33>2^56 G3+E5@36>10^80 Bb3@39>4^80 E4@43>2^56 G3+D6@46>11^104 Bb3@49>4^80 E4@53>1^56 A3+C6@56>6^80 C4@60>4^80 F4@63>4^56
@47 [Gm | F]
  A.PIANO 1: C6@2>4^80 Bb5@5>4^80 A5@9>2^80 Bb3+G5@13>5^80 D4@17>3^56 G4@20>2^56 Bb5@23>3^80 A5@27>2^56 G5@30>2^56 C4+F5@34>5^56 F4@39>2^32 A4@41>2^56 C4+G5@44>2^80 F5@46>1^80 F4+E5@48>2^80 A4+F5@50>4^80 C4+A5@54>12^80 F4@58>2^56 A4@61>2^56
@48 [F | Bb7]
  A.PIANO 1: C4+G5@1>12^80 E4@4>2^56 Bb4@7>2^56 F4@12>3^80 A4@16>2^56 C5@18>2^56 F4+G5@23>3^80 F5@25>2^80 A4@26>2^56 E5@27>2^56 C5@29>2^56 F5@30>3^56 F4@33>2^56 Bb4@36>3^80 D5@39>2^56 F4+G5@43>2^56 Bb4+F5@45>3^80 E5@47>2^56 D5+F5@49>5^56 F4@52>5^56 A4@57>2^32 C5@59>3^80 A5@62>2^80
@49 [F | Bb]
  A.PIANO 1: G5@2>2^80 F5@5>4^80 E5@8>4^80 D5@11>3^80 C5@14>4^80 Bb4@17>5^80 C3+C4@18>5^80 A4@21>3^80 G4@23>4^80 F3+F4@27>5^80 A3@31>2^80 C4@34>2^56 F3+G4@37>4^80 F4@39>2^80 A3@41>2^56 E4@42>2^56 C4+F4@44>7^56 F3@47>4^56 Bb3@50>3^80 D4@54>2^32 F3+G4@57>2^56 Bb3+F4@59>4^56 E4@61>2^56 D4@63>2^32 F4@64>5^56
@50 [F]
  A.PIANO 1: F3@3>4^80 A3@7>2^56 C4@10>5^56 A4@12>2^80 G4@15>2^56 F4@19>4^56 E4@22>2^56 D4@25>2^56 C4@28>4^56 C2+C3+Bb3@31>4^80 A3@35>3^80 G3@38>3^56 F2+F3@41>4^104 A2@45>3^104 C3@48>2^80 F2@51>2^80 A2@54>2^80 C3@58>2^80 F2@61>3^56 A3+C4+F4@62>3^104
@51 [F]
  A.PIANO 1: A2@2>3^56 C3@5>2^80 F2@8>3^80 A2@13>2^80 C3@16>8^56 A3+C4+F4@23>28^104 F2@24>25^80
